name: BioAnalysis-${{APP_NAME_SUFFIX}}
description: Bioinformatics reference and lightweight analysis agent for approved assay data and reference lookups.

conversation_starters.title: QC checklist
conversation_starters.text: What QC checks should I review for this assay results table?

conversation_starters.title: Gene lookup
conversation_starters.text: Summarize the functional role of TP53 and its major pathways.

conversation_starters.title: Protein context
conversation_starters.text: What is known about this protein accession and its disease relevance?

conversation_starters.title: Exploratory chart
conversation_starters.text: Create a simple summary chart from this uploaded assay CSV.

conversation_starters.title: Pipeline handoff
conversation_starters.text: What validated pipeline should I use for single-cell RNA-seq QC outside this agent?

conversation_starters.title: Study design
conversation_starters.text: What controls should I include in a multiplex assay design?

disclaimer.text: Research and operational support only. Validate all outputs with approved sources and qualified experts before clinical, regulatory, or patient-impacting use.
